formulas.name: Plot Analysis
formulas.description: Examination of the plot structure, its elements, and how it contributes to the overall narrative.
formulas.key points: Exposition, Rising Action, Climax, Falling Action, Resolution
formulas.notes: Understanding the plot is crucial to analyzing the story's themes, characters, and literary devices.

formulas.name: Character Analysis
formulas.description: Study of the characters' roles, motivations, and relationships within the narrative.
formulas.key points: Protagonist, Antagonist, Dynamic Character, Static Character
formulas.notes: Analyzing characters helps in understanding the story's themes and the author's message.

formulas.name: Imagery and Symbolism
formulas.description: Examination of literary devices used to create vivid descriptions and convey deeper meanings.
formulas.notes: Identifying literary devices helps in interpreting the story's themes and author's intent.

formulas.name: Themes and Messages
formulas.description: Identification of recurring ideas and author's intended messages.
formulas.notes: Understanding the themes and messages is essential to analyzing the story's purpose and significance.
